author: theopavlove
description: Adds a customizable GitHub-like floating table of contents.

manifest.author: theopavlove
manifest.description: Adds a customizable GitHub-like floating table of contents.
manifest.name: Dynamic Outline

name: Dynamic Outline

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Implement collapsible headings by @theopavlove in https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/pull/42
- **Refactor:** Update settings descriptions by @theopavlove in https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/pull/43

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.18.0...1.19.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's Changed - **Feature:** On mobile, clicking outside the outline hides it (#36). - **Feature:** Introduce custom heading-level styling in the Style Settings "Headings" menu (#38). ## Code changes - `li` tab sizing is now set via classes instead of `style` (#38). **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.17.1...1.18.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Fix:** Prevent creating a large gap between the outline window and the note's top bar (#33).


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.17.0...1.17.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Add "Hide outline on jump" settings option, which allows hiding the outline window when selecting a heading by clicking or via keyboard navigation (#18).
-  **Feature:** Add "Avoid content overlap" settings option, which hides the outline if the note/window becomes too narrow (#14).


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.16.0...1.17.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Add "Auto-hide search bar" settings option. When set to true (by default), the search bar is hidden when there are few headings in the document.
- **Feature:** The outline button is now hidden when there is 1 or 0 headings in the document.
- **Fix:** "Toggle automatically on file open" works now as intended – it triggers the outline only once per note (#31).
- **Fix:** Editing Toolbar shouldn't cause UI shifts when set to "following" anymore (#29).

## Code changes

- The outline is now set to `display: none;` instead of being removed from the DOM each time it is hidden (#30).
- Introduce two new classes to manage backend outline logic – `Outline` and `OutlineManager` (#28).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.15.1...1.16.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Fix:** The outline should not freeze the whole Obsidian application now when updating note headings in a large vault (similar to #19).
- **Fix:**  Interface should not break anymore when splitting tabs horizontally (related to #12)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.15.0...1.15.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** New Settings option for the automatic toggling – "Content overlap" – which allows you to set a threshold for the automatic outline window appearance.
- **Feature:** Revamped Settings screen.
- **Feature:** The outline button's icon is now more distinct when clicking the button (but not when hovering over).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.14.0...1.15.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Fuzzy Searching for Headings (#20).
- **Fix:** When jumping to a header, focus the editor instead of the search field (partially #18).
- **Chore:** Bump esbuild from 0.17.3 to 0.25.0.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.13.1...1.14.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Fix:** Focus on the last note when the Dynamic Outline window is closed.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.13.0...1.13.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** add "Dynamic heading indentation" setting, which is set by default now (#17). It allows to dynamically adjust heading indentation based on the previous heading level.

| Before | After |
| --- | --- |
| ![23199](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/31eb3164-2343-46f2-aea0-44d65a6537bf) | ![94530](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/65a0ab7e-5df9-461b-82b0-27bdacc27989) |


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.12.0...1.13.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Inherit heading parameters such as color (`--h*-color` variables), style, variant from theme by default (except for `weight`, which still remains bold for H1 and normal for H2-H6 by default). Also update corresponding Style Settings options (#16).

![13118](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/70742329-b062-4ae6-a8cb-ab85973fd107)


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.11.0...1.12.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Added a new Style Settings option – "Hide button" from the toolbar (#15).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.10.3...1.11.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Fix:** Don't apply heading hover when the input field is cleared.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.10.2...1.10.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature (tiny):** Set the current hovered index to the 1st position when the search field is not empty (#9).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.10.1...1.10.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- **Fix:** Prevent major UI crashes for Windows users when the outline is too big to fit the screen. (#12).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.10.0...1.10.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- **Feature:** Added new Style Settings options: heading style customization (H1-H6).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.9.0...1.10.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Add keyboard control to navigate the outline: `ArrowDown`/`Tab`, `ArrowUp`/`Shift+Tab`, `Enter`, `Escape`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.8.0...1.9.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** New Style Settings options: "Window offset top" and "Window offset bottom"
- **Fix:** Prevent some UI breaking by dynamically adjusting window offset and max-height (including Editing Toolbar).
- **Refactor:** Set new default top and bottom window offset.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.7.3...1.8.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Fix:** `Undo close tab` Obsidian command (`cmd+shift+T`) should now properly render both the button and outline for the restored tab.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.7.2...1.7.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Fix:** When the heading changes levels but not its content, its position is automatically updated in the outline.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.7.1...1.7.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Fix:** When reloading the plugin via the pop-up button, do not close the settings page (#11)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.7.0...1.7.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Added a new Settings option – "Window location".
- **Fix:** Remove current active heading highlight flickering while typing in markdown.
- **Refactor:** The "Reload" button in settings is now hidden until the corresponding setting is toggled.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.6.0...1.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Added a new Style Settings option – "Active heading background color" – and changed the default active heading styling.
- **Refactor:** Significantly improved active heading highlighting speed and removed occasional visual stutters.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.5.0...1.6.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** Add restart buttons for the settings options that require it.
- **Fix:** When hovering over the button with `toggleOnHover` on, the current heading will be displayed at the very top.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.4.0...1.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Feature:** New Style Settings options (#8):
    - Active heading indication color
    - Active heading font weight
- **Fix:** Buttons not created in background tabs on plugin initialization
- **Fix:** Outline Window not hiding properly when pinned

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* **Refactor:** major class revamp to simplify the code logic and button/window management


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.2.2...1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- **Fix:** remove `:has` selector logic from `styles.css` to remove performance issues for large vaults

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- **Fix:** When the Style Settings plugin is disabled, the location of the Dynamic Outline window is now correct.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- **Feature**: Settings menu option to toggle ability to hover over outline button icon to show menu (#1)
- **Fix**: apply custom top position for the window if the Editing Toolbar is located at the top of the file (#6)
- **Fix**: do not reset heading highlighting while editing the markdown

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/theopavlove/obsidian-dynamic-outline/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
